overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing nighttime vehicle traversal through futuristic elevated highways. The clip features a distinctive curved highway with luminous digital billboards embedded in the road surface, transitioning to open wet asphalt highways and enclosed walled corridors. The cyberpunk cityscape is illuminated by neon advertisements and street lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated curved highway with luminous digital billboard road surface

agents.ego_description: navigating a curved elevated highway where the road surface displays glowing digital advertisements and cyberpunk cityscape visible in the distance

notable_agents.action: vehicle traveling ahead on the curved digital highway

entered.detail: road surface composed of glowing digital screens displaying colorful advertisements
metal guardrails along the edge of the elevated highway structure
tall modern building with illuminated windows and neon accents

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives along a curved elevated highway at night, with the road surface itself composed of glowing digital billboards displaying advertisements. The cyberpunk cityscape rises in the distance with neon-lit skyscrapers, while the highway curves gently to the right. Sparse traffic moves ahead on this luminous roadway.

scene_state.functional_zone: open elevated multi-lane highway with wet reflective surface

events.description: vehicle descends from the digital billboard highway onto the lower main arterial highway

agents.ego_description: descending onto the main highway and accelerating along wet asphalt with moderate traffic and overhead signage visible

entered.detail: multi-lane road with wet reflective asphalt surface glistening under street lights
tall poles with bright lamps illuminating the highway
large directional signs suspended over the highway lanes

segments.scene_description: After descending from the digital highway, the vehicle travels along an open elevated highway with wet reflective asphalt. Street lights line both sides of the road, and overhead directional signs are visible ahead. Moderate traffic moves along the multi-lane road while the city skyline stretches into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed highway corridor with high walls and illuminated advertisements

events.description: highway becomes enclosed with high walls covered in glowing billboards on both sides

agents.ego_description: driving through the enclosed highway section with walls covered in illuminated advertisements and tunnel-like structure ahead

notable_agents.action: vehicle ahead entering the enclosed tunnel section

entered.detail: high concrete or metal walls lining both sides of the highway creating a corridor effect
large illuminated advertisement screens mounted on the highway walls
overhead covering and walls creating a tunnel entrance ahead

segments.scene_description: The highway transitions into an enclosed corridor with high walls on both sides covered in glowing billboards. The environment becomes more tunnel-like with the sky mostly blocked by overhead structures. The road continues straight ahead with sparse traffic, illuminated by artificial lighting from the wall-mounted advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous vehicle journey through a futuristic cityscape, transitioning from a luminous digital roadway into an open highway and finally into a confined urban corridor. It begins on a curved elevated highway where the road surface itself consists of glowing digital billboards, with neon-lit skyscrapers rising in the distance. As the vehicle descends from this luminous path, the environment shifts to an open stretch of wet, reflective asphalt lined with street lights and overhead directional signs. The scene then narrows as the highway enters an enclosed corridor, where high walls covered in glowing advertisements replace the open skyline. Finally, the perspective pushes straight ahead through this tunnel-like space, illuminated entirely by the artificial glare of the surrounding wall-mounted displays.
